feat.name: Aegis of the Dissolution
feat.text: You are a friend of shadows and know how to avoid the troubles they bring. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects with the darkness or shadow traits.

traits.name: Wayang
traits.text: Small people native to the Netherworld. Immigrated to Golarion after Earthfall.
